arts.ttl: Luke McCowan needs Celtic 7 year Champions League itch scratched by doing 'hardest possible thing'
arts.sum: It's been that long since the Hoops have won away from home in this competition ahead of trip to Zagreb

arts.ttl: Celtic warm up for Real Madrid by hitting double figures but Rangers outdo them in wild Women's Scottish Cup third round
arts.sum: Here's what happened in a chaotic round of Scottish Cup action

arts.ttl: Charlie Nicholas makes Ole Gunnar Solskjaer and 'old days of Manchester United' claim about Celtic
arts.sum: He shared that when a Celtic player is coming off the bench, it’s like Ole Gunnar Solskjaer being introduced into the action during his days as a super sub for Sir Alex Ferguson. Charlie Nicholas says Celtic bench like ‘the old days of Manchester United’

arts.ttl: Paul Merson rips through Ange for forcing Celtic style on Tottenham - 'This isn't Kilmarnock or St Mirren'
arts.sum: The Sky Sports pundit knows what Spurs are going to do each week as Postecoglou doesn't have what he had at Celtic

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd delivers a dose of reality to Rangers fans ahead of League Cup final vs Celtic
arts.sum: However, it was the League Cup final against Celtic that was on Kris Boyd’s mind this weekend as Rangers took on Ross County and it seems that the Sky Sports pundit is being realistic about his old club’s chances of pulling off a win. Kris Boyd ‘not kidded’ over Rangers’ chances of beating Celtic in League Cup final

arts.ttl: Hearts win derby as Celtic, City & Rangers win
arts.sum: Hearts win the Women's Scottish Cup Edinburgh derby as Celtic, Glasgow City and holders Rangers also progress to the last 16.
Watch Kyogo Furuhashi's strike that rounded off a 3-0 win for Scottish Premiership leaders Celtic against Hibernian.

arts.ttl: 'Up there'... Adam Idah says 'amazing' Celtic teammate is the best he's ever played with after Hibs win
arts.sum: When asked if the Dane is the best goalkeeper he’s played with, Idah told Celtic TV, “I think so. Adam Idah lauds Celtic hero as one of the best he’s ever played with
